member.name: T:MauiApp1.Models.FirebasePoiDto
member.summary: DTO ánh xạ document Firestore → POI model. Firestore dùng camelCase, model dùng PascalCase → cần JsonPropertyName.

member.name: T:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Audio
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Âm thanh.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.AudioDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Nghe nội dung giới thiệu bằng âm thanh.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.AutoAudio
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Thuyết minh tự động.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.AutoDescription
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Thuyết minh tự động đa ngôn ngữ.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.AutoGuide
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Thuyết Minh Tự Động.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.AutoPlay
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Tự động phát thuyết minh khi vào vùng.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.AutoPlayDesc
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Tự động phát thuyết minh khi vào vùng.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Cancel
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Hủy.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.ChooseLanguage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Chọn ngôn ngữ.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Detail
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Chi tiết.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.EnterArea
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bạn đã vào khu vực.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.ExitArea
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bạn đã rời khỏi khu vực.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.FoodStreet
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Phố Ẩm Thực.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.GPSBackground
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to GPS chạy nền.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Introduction
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Giới thiệu.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Language
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Ngôn ngữ.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Latitude
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Vĩ độ.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.List
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Danh Sách.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.ListenNow
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Nghe ngay.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.ListTitle
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Danh sách.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Location
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Vị trí.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Longitude
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Kinh độ.

member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bản Đồ.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.MapTitle
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bản đồ.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.OK
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to OK.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Radius
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bán kính.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Rating
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Đánh giá.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Reset
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Khôi phục.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.ResetConfirm
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Bạn muốn khôi phục cài đặt mặc định?.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.ResetDefault
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Reset về mặc định.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Settings
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cài đặt.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.SettingsTitle
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Cài đặt.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Speak
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Phát.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.SpeechSpeed
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Tốc độ giọng nói.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Stop
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Dừng.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.SupportedLanguage
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Ngôn ngữ hỗ trợ.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Theme
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Giao diện.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.VietnamFood
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Món Việt.

member.name: P:MauiApp1.Resources.Languages.AppResources.Volume
member.summary: Looks up a localized string similar to Âm lượng.

member.name: T:MauiApp1.Services.FirebaseService
member.summary: Đồng bộ POI từ Firestore REST API (không cần SDK nặng). Chiến lược: Firebase là nguồn chính, SQLite là cache offline.

member.name: M:MauiApp1.Services.FirebaseService.FetchPoisAsync
member.summary: Trả về danh sách POI từ Firestore. Nếu mạng lỗi → trả về null (caller dùng SQLite cache).

member.name: M:MauiApp1.Services.FirebaseService.LogHistoryAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Ghi log khi người dùng nghe thuyết minh (GPS hoặc QR). Fire-and-forget — không await ở caller để không block UI.

member.name: T:MauiApp1.Services.PoiRepository
member.summary: Nguồn dữ liệu POI duy nhất cho toàn app. Chiến lược offline-first: 1. Load SQLite cache ngay lập tức (không chờ mạng) 2. Fetch Firebase background 3. Nếu Firebase trả data → cập nhật SQLite + báo UI reload

member.name: T:MauiApp1.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
